message:
test(fcp-core): pin ZoneKeyAlgorithm wrong-form rejection sentinel + ZoneKeyManifest embedded round-trip (flywheel_connectors-aznqw)

ZoneKeyAlgorithm at zone_keys.rs:107 is a 2-variant enum with
#[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")] producing a SURPRISING wire form:
ChaCha20Poly1305 → "cha_cha20_poly1305" (note inner _ from serde
splitting at every uppercase-to-lowercase transition, including inside
the ChaCha20 acronym). Existing zone_namespace_display_serde_tag.rs
pins the happy-path JSON+CBOR forms.

This pin adds the residual axes:
  * Wrong-form rejection sentinel: the more-obvious chacha20_poly1305
    (without inner _) MUST NOT decode — pin so a future tolerant
    alias silently changes the wire vocabulary,
  * PascalCase / SCREAMING / kebab-case rejection,
  * X-prefix differentiates X variant ("x_..." prefix pinned),
  * CBOR form is Text scalar not integer (pin so a future
    #[serde(into = "u8")] is caught),
  * ZoneKeyManifest embeds algorithm with canonical wire form for
    both variants, JSON+CBOR round-trip preserves algorithm,
  * skip_serializing_if for valid_until/prev_zone_key_id/rekey_policy,
  * empty wrapped_keys/wrapped_object_id_keys serialize as []
    (no skip_when_empty),
  * 2-variant closed-vocabulary count sentinel,
  * Copy + Clone + PartialEq derive intact (storage code relies on),
  * WrappedZoneKey + WrappedObjectIdKey 3-field shape pinned (no
    per-recipient algorithm field — algorithm scoped at manifest level
    only).

17 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-aznqw cargo test -p
fcp-core --test zone_key_algorithm_serde.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
